linting.notes: No linter configuration found. This repository contains shell scripts but has no shellcheck config, no pre-commit hooks, and no linting setup. Shellcheck could be run manually with: find lib -name '*.sh' -exec shellcheck {} +

testing.notes: This repository IS a test framework (bash assertion library for OpenShift/Kubernetes testing), but it has no tests of its own. The test-cmd.sh script is designed to be used by consuming projects, not to test this library itself. It expects tests in ${OS_ROOT}/test/cmd/*.sh which don't exist in this repo.

ci.notes: No CI configuration found. No .github/workflows, no Tekton pipelines, no Jenkins, no CI setup at all.

build.notes: Pure shell script library. No build required. No dependencies to install. Designed to be used as a git submodule by other projects.

conventions.import_style: Shell scripts use 'source' to import library files. The lib/init.sh script is the main entrypoint that sources all other library files recursively.
conventions.notes: Library provides assertion functions like os::cmd::expect_success, os::cmd::expect_failure, os::cmd::try_until_text for use in consuming projects.

container_recipe.notes: Container validation skipped - no tests or linters to validate. This is a library with no validation infrastructure.

validation.summary: No validation performed - repository has no tests, no linters, no CI configuration to validate.
